This is the unprocessed version stored in no_geo.csv.gz before renaming to epic_pct_rsv_pos_tests.

epic_n_all_encounters_weekly.long_name: Total Weekly Emergency Department Encounters (All Causes)
epic_n_all_encounters_weekly.short_description: Total number of weekly emergency department encounters for any cause.
epic_n_all_encounters_weekly.long_description: Total count of weekly emergency department encounters for any cause, used as the denominator for respiratory illness percentages. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_week.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 all-cause weekly ED encounters in the strata
epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_week.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the all-cause weekly ED encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_week.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 all-cause weekly emergency department encounters in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_all_encounters_weekly) is imputed as 5.

epic_cosmos.name: Epic Cosmos
epic_cosmos.description: Epic Cosmos is a collaborative research platform containing de-identified patient data from over 300 million patients across more than 1,600 hospitals and health systems using Epic electronic health record systems. Data is accessed via SlicerDicer, a self-service analytics tool. The dataset includes emergency department visits, diagnoses, immunizations, laboratory results, and other clinical data. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed. Coverage extends across all U.S. states and territories. Note that county-level and city-level stratifications could differ markedly in total sample size due to high levels of missingness of county data in some states.
epic_cosmos.restrictions: The data can be re-used with appropriate attribution. A suggested citation relating to this data is 'Results of research performed with Epic Cosmos were obtained from the PopHIVE platform (https://github.com/PopHIVE/Ingest).'

epic_n_flu.long_description: Number of emergency room (ER) encounters with Influenza ICD-10-CM codes. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_n_rsv.long_description: Number of emergency room (ER) encounters with RSV ICD-10-CM codes. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_n_ed_j12_j18.long_description: Number of emergency room (ER) encounters with Pneumonia (J12-J18) ICD-10-CM codes. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_pct_all.short_description: Percentage of All encounters patients among all ER encounters.
epic_pct_all.long_description: Percentage of emergency room encounters attributable to All encounters ICD-10-CM codes, calculated as the count divided by total all-cause ER encounters.

epic_pct_covid.short_description: Percentage of COVID patients among all ER encounters.
epic_pct_covid.long_description: Percentage of emergency room encounters attributable to COVID ICD-10-CM codes, calculated as the count divided by total all-cause ER encounters.

epic_pct_flu.short_description: Percentage of Influenza patients among all ER encounters.
epic_pct_flu.long_description: Percentage of emergency room encounters attributable to Influenza ICD-10-CM codes, calculated as the count divided by total all-cause ER encounters.

epic_pct_rsv.short_description: Percentage of RSV patients among all ER encounters.
epic_pct_rsv.long_description: Percentage of emergency room encounters attributable to RSV ICD-10-CM codes, calculated as the count divided by total all-cause ER encounters.

epic_pct_rsv_pos_tests.long_name: RSV Positive Tests Emergency Room (ER) Encounters (%)
epic_pct_rsv_pos_tests.short_description: Percentage of RSV Positive Tests patients among all ER encounters.
epic_pct_rsv_pos_tests.long_description: Percentage of emergency room encounters attributable to RSV Positive Tests ICD-10-CM codes, calculated as the count divided by total all-cause ER encounters.

epic_pct_j12_j18_tested_rsv.long_name: J12-J18 Tested RSV Emergency Room (ER) Encounters (%)
epic_pct_j12_j18_tested_rsv.short_description: Percentage of J12-J18 Tested RSV patients among all ER encounters.
epic_pct_j12_j18_tested_rsv.long_description: Percentage of emergency room encounters attributable to J12-J18 Tested RSV ICD-10-CM codes, calculated as the count divided by total all-cause ER encounters.

epic_pct_rsv_pos_tests.1.long_name: Percent of tests among hospitalized pneumonia admissions (ICD-10: J12-J18) that are positive for RSV
epic_pct_rsv_pos_tests.1.short_description: Percent of tests among pneumonia admissions (ICD-10: J12-J18) that are positive for RSV.
epic_pct_rsv_pos_tests.1.long_description: Percent of RSV tests among hospitalized pneumonia admissions (ICD-10: J12-J18) that are positive for RSV. This is among hospital admissions, including those that started in the emergency department. Data accessed via Epic Cosmos SlicerDicer.

suppressed_rsv_test.long_name: Suppression flag for RSV test encounter count
suppressed_rsv_test.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the RSV test encounter count was suppressed (fewer than 10), 0 otherwise.
suppressed_rsv_test.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the count of J12-J18 pneumonia encounters with RSV testing (epic_n_ed_j12_j18) was suppressed due to fewer than 10 cases, in which case the count is imputed as 5. Otherwise 0.

positive_rsv_tests_(%).long_name: Percent of RSV Tests Positive Among Pneumonia Admissions (raw, no geography)
positive_rsv_tests_(%).short_description: Raw export column: percent of RSV tests positive among J12-J18 pneumonia admissions.
positive_rsv_tests_(%).long_description: Raw column from Epic Cosmos SlicerDicer export. Represents the percentage of RSV tests that returned positive among hospitalized pneumonia admissions (ICD-10: J12-J18). This is the unprocessed version stored in no_geo.csv.gz before renaming to epic_pct_rsv_pos_tests.

rsv_tests.long_name: Percent of Pneumonia Admissions Tested for RSV (raw, no geography)
rsv_tests.short_description: Raw export column: percent of J12-J18 pneumonia admissions receiving an RSV test.
rsv_tests.long_description: Raw column from Epic Cosmos SlicerDicer export. Represents the percentage of hospitalized pneumonia admissions (ICD-10: J12-J18) that received an RSV test. This is the unprocessed version stored in no_geo.csv.gz before renaming to epic_pct_j12_j18_tested_rsv.

epic_n_all_encounters_weekly.long_name: Total Weekly Emergency Department Encounters (All Causes)
epic_n_all_encounters_weekly.short_description: Total number of weekly emergency department encounters for any cause.
epic_n_all_encounters_weekly.long_description: Total count of weekly emergency department encounters for any cause, used as the denominator for respiratory illness percentages. Data from Epic Cosmos, which contains de-identified data from 300M+ patients across 1,600+ hospitals. Counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed as 5.

epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_week.long_name: Suppression flag: fewer than 10 all-cause weekly ED encounters in the strata
epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_week.short_description: Binary indicator: 1 if the all-cause weekly ED encounter count was suppressed, 0 otherwise.
epic_suppressed_flag_all_encounters_week.long_description: Binary indicator: 1 if fewer than 10 all-cause weekly emergency department encounters in the strata, 0 otherwise. When suppressed, the corresponding count (epic_n_all_encounters_weekly) is imputed as 5.

epic_pct_j12_j18_tested_rsv.1.long_name: Percent of hospitalized pneumonia admissions (J12-J18) receiving a test for RSV
epic_pct_j12_j18_tested_rsv.1.short_description: Percent of hospitalized pneumonia admissions (J12-J18) receiving a test for RSV.
epic_pct_j12_j18_tested_rsv.1.long_description: Percent of hospitalized pneumonia admissions (ICD-10: J12-J18) receiving a test for RSV. This is among hospital admissions, including those that started in the emergency department. Data accessed via Epic Cosmos SlicerDicer.

epic_cosmos.name: Epic Cosmos
epic_cosmos.description: Epic Cosmos is a collaborative research platform containing de-identified patient data from over 300 million patients across more than 1,600 hospitals and health systems using Epic electronic health record systems. Data is accessed via SlicerDicer, a self-service analytics tool. The dataset includes emergency department visits, diagnoses, immunizations, laboratory results, and other clinical data. Due to privacy protections, counts fewer than 10 are suppressed and imputed. Coverage extends across all U.S. states and territories. Note that county-level and city-level stratifications could differ markedly in total sample size due to high levels of missingness of county data in some states.
epic_cosmos.restrictions: The data can be re-used with appropriate attribution. A suggested citation relating to this data is 'Results of research performed with Epic Cosmos were obtained from the PopHIVE platform (https://github.com/PopHIVE/Ingest).'
